note: Border-safe TCB home (RD-0361 R4 / #143). The ONLY external imports this package may EVER carry are node:crypto (Ed25519 + sha256 for the attestation TCB) + TYPE-ONLY seam interfaces from @galerina/core-runtime. It must NEVER import @galerina/core-compiler (that would drag the compiler across the Hardened Border — the exact fail-open this package exists to prevent). This gate IS that machine-checkable rule: a compiler import here fails the border build. Holds record-abi + the WASM TCB (wasm-runtime).
